targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(quantity), 0) AS value FROM production_entries WHERE date = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(saree_revenue), 0) AS value FROM production_entries WHERE date >= date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM employees WHERE status = 'active'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM attendance WHERE date = CURRENT_DATE AND status = 'present'
SELECT date AS time, SUM(quantity) AS sarees, SUM(saree_revenue) AS revenue FROM production_entries WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - 14 GROUP BY date ORDER BY date

SELECT e.name AS metric, SUM(p.quantity) AS value FROM production_entries p JOIN employees e ON p.employee_id = e.id WHERE p.date >= date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY e.name ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 8

SELECT e.name AS "Employee", SUM(p.quantity) AS "Total Sarees", SUM(p.defects) AS "Defects", ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(p.defects)::numeric / NULLIF(SUM(p.quantity),0) * 100, 0), 2) AS "Defect %" FROM production_entries p JOIN employees e ON p.employee_id = e.id WHERE p.date >= date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY e.name ORDER BY "Defect %" DESC

SELECT e.name AS "Employee", s.total_sarees AS "Sarees", s.total_wage AS "Wage (₹)", CASE WHEN s.is_paid THEN 'Paid' ELSE 'Pending' END AS "Status" FROM salary s JOIN employees e ON s.employee_id = e.id WHERE s.period_type = 'weekly' AND s.period_start = date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE) ORDER BY s.total_wage DESC
